content.formation: Delaware LLC formed June 12, 2017; no operations before July 7, 2017
content.ownership_chain: JJF SPV → JJ Funding LLC (JJ Issuer/Member) → JJ SPV Guarantor LLC → JJBC LLC → Jimmy John's LLC → JJ Holding Company LLC → IRB Holding Corp → Inspire Brands, Inc.
content.business: Offers franchises for development and operation of restaurants under Jimmy John's trademark

sub_policies.detail: 52 or 53 weeks ending Sunday closest to December 31. 2024, 2023, 2022 each consisted of 52 weeks.
Cash held to meet reserve requirements under Securitization Transaction. Balances exceed FDIC limits. All highly liquid investments with maturity ≤3 months are cash equivalents.
Primarily from franchisees per franchise agreements. Due within 30 days. Allowance estimated on lifetime expected loss, historical collection experience, and current conditions.

Trademark/trade name reviewed at least annually (first day of fiscal Q4). Qualitative then quantitative test. Relief from royalty method (Level 3 inputs). Assumptions: future revenues, royalty rate, terminal value, discount rate. No impairment indicated in 2024, 2023, or 2022.

Franchise agreements amortized straight-line over 17-year useful life. Reviewed for impairment when events or circumstances indicate carrying amount may not be recoverable. No impairment indicated in any period.
Cash, receivables, payables approximate book value (short-term). Indefinite-lived intangible tested using Level 3 inputs. No changes in valuation techniques in 2024.
From/to Member per Inspire centralized cash management. Not expected to be repaid. Presented net on equity statement and as financing on cash flow.
LLC — income taxes are obligation of Member. No provision, benefit, assets, or liabilities for federal or state income taxes.
Recorded when probable and reasonably estimable. Legal costs expensed as incurred.
Five-step model per ASC 606. Revenue includes franchise fees, royalty revenue, and training/other income.

content.royalty_revenue: 6% of restaurant sales per franchise agreement. Recognized as earned. Royalties from JJE (related party) on same basis.
content.development_incentives: Starting 2021, offered lower royalties in initial years. Recognized over remaining agreement term.
content.initial_franchise_fees: Deferred when received; recognized over 10-year contractual term once restaurant opens.
content.renewal_fees: Recognized over contractual term once agreement signed and fee paid.
content.commitment_fee_deposits: Forfeited and recognized as revenue upon termination of commitment to open.
content.training_and_other: Training fees from franchisee owners/employees per franchise agreement terms.

securitization_notes.secured_by: substantially all assets of securitization entities including the Company
securitization_notes.note: If not repaid by anticipated repayment date, additional interest accrues

content.legal_matters: Involved in various litigation; based on available information, does not believe outcome will have material adverse effect on financial position.

content.management_agreement: JJF manages assets and performs franchising, marketing, IP, reporting, operating, and support services on behalf of the Company.
content.standalone_caveat: Results of operations may not be indicative of those that would have been achieved on a stand-alone basis.

note_families_not_present: lease_accounting (entity has no leases — SPV structure)
long_term_debt (securitization notes are at parent level, not on SPV balance sheet)
advertising_fund_accounting (not separately disclosed in SPV financials)
